description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.4 Docker image and defines two stages: validate and policy. In the validate stage add a lint job that runs `gem install mdl -v 0.4.0` then `mdl -s <(echo "rule 'MD009', :br_spaces => 4") .`. In the policy stage add a policy job that sets `GIT_STRATEGY` to `none` and executes a curl request to `${GITECT_HOST}/api/v1/gitlab.com/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}/~/${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}/${CI_COMMIT_SHA}/policy-compliance` with the `${GITECT_HOST_TOKEN}` header, echoes the JSON output, and exits with an error if the output does not contain "true". The policy job should run on all branches except `master` and should not run on tags. Define global variables `GITECT_HOST` set to `https://gitect2.codethink.co.uk` and `TARGET_BRANCH` set to `master`.
